name: Pan-Fried Brook Trout
recipeIngredient: 4 Brook trout, with head and tail left on,
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the trout under cold running water and pat dry.
2. Dust lightly with flour, and sprinkle with salt.
3. In a large skillet, melt 3 tablespoons of the butter and the oil.
4. When it is hot, put in the trout and fry over medium-high heat.
5. When browned, turn and brown the other side; each side will take about 3 minutes.
6. Melt the remaining 4 tablespoons of butter with lemon juice and chives in a small saucepan.
7. When the trout is done, transfer to a warm platter and pour on the sauce.
